notes.summary: Eliminated playtest friction where collecting copper at the Copper Mine did not advance the bridge_collapse quest until scene re-entry. Moved the existing band-aid mutation timing from scene-creation only to ALSO fire inline at the moment of surface_copper/deep_copper collection. End state is identical to the prior scene-entry band-aid; only the WHEN changed. No semantic change to progression logic.

diffs.BaseSubScene.js_addResource_jsdoc:
Added param doc:
  * @param {(updatedState: object, scene: BaseSubScene) => void} [config.onAfterCollect]
  *   — optional scene-specific hook fired AFTER the inventory mutation and
  *     pickup SFX. Wrapped in try/catch so it can't break generic collection.
diffs.CopperMineScene.js_inline_wiring: Added `onAfterCollect: () => this._mintCopperOreSampleIfNeeded()` to the surface_copper and deep_copper addResource() calls only. NOT added to the wire_spool addResource (side-quest item, irrelevant to bridge_collapse).

idempotency_audit.inventory_check: Helper early-returns on `(st.inventory || []).includes('copper_ore_sample')` BEFORE mutating state or firing the dialog. So any second call after the first successful mint is a silent no-op — no double-mint, no double-dialog.
idempotency_audit.step_check: Helper early-returns on `aq?.id !== 'bridge_collapse'` and on `step?.id !== 'collect_copper'`. After the player's quest auto-advances on the next tick (because copper_ore_sample now satisfies the collect_copper requirement), the step check will fail on any later call, providing a second guard.
idempotency_audit.active_quest_check: Helper early-returns when there is no active bridge_collapse quest (e.g. player is doing the side-quest collect_copper_samples instead). Side-quest path is fully unaffected.
idempotency_audit.exception_safety: The inline call site is wrapped in a try/catch in BaseSubScene.addResource so any future bug in the helper cannot break resource collection.

manual_verification_scenarios.name: Friction case (the user's reported flow)
manual_verification_scenarios.setup: Player on bridge_collapse step collect_copper, no copper_ore_sample, no mine copper. Walks into Copper Mine for the first time.
manual_verification_scenarios.expected_before_fix: Player picks up surface_copper and/or deep_copper. Quest does NOT advance because the mine items don't match the required item id. Player walks to garage workbench — workbench's conditional grant of steel_sample fails because step is still collect_copper. User reports: "does not activate anything unique".
manual_verification_scenarios.expected_after_fix: Player picks up surface_copper. addResource's onAfterCollect fires _mintCopperOreSampleIfNeeded(). Helper sees bridge_collapse + collect_copper + hasMineCopper=true + no canonical sample → mints copper_ore_sample, saves, fires Zuzu dialog. Quest advances on next tick. Walking to workbench now advances correctly.

manual_verification_scenarios.name: Re-entry case (original band-aid path still works)
manual_verification_scenarios.setup: Player has surface_copper from a previous session, exits and re-enters Copper Mine after the fix is shipped (or has not yet collected anything in current scene mount).
manual_verification_scenarios.expected: createWorld() runs `this._mintCopperOreSampleIfNeeded();` at scene entry. Helper sees the same preconditions and mints the sample on entry. This is the original band-aid behavior, preserved as a safety net.

manual_verification_scenarios.name: Already-have-canonical case (no double-fire)
manual_verification_scenarios.setup: Player has both surface_copper AND copper_ore_sample (e.g. they collected mine copper, the inline mint already fired, then they walked out and came back to grab deep_copper).
manual_verification_scenarios.expected: On scene re-entry: helper early-returns at the inventory.includes('copper_ore_sample') check — no dialog re-fires. On collecting deep_copper: onAfterCollect fires the helper, helper early-returns at the same inventory check — no dialog, no double-mint.

notes.build_status: npm run build: PASS (vite build, 867 modules transformed, built in 12.20s, no errors). Pre-existing chunk-size warnings unrelated to this change.

scope_compliance.no_progression_semantics_change: Helper preconditions are byte-identical to the prior inline block. Only the call site count changed (1 → 3: scene entry + 2 resource onAfterCollect callbacks).
scope_compliance.single_layer_logic_timing: No visual, audio, or camera changes.
scope_compliance.hmr_preserved: Bottom of CopperMineScene.js untouched — registerSceneHmr line intact. BaseSubScene.js has no HMR registration to preserve.
